返回本批次

全球刚刚经历了有记录以来最热的 11 年

The world just lived through the 11 hottest years on record

www.nature.com 作者 Brajeshwar 分数 38 评论 13 2026/03/23 23:37
打开 HN 原帖 打开原始文章

中文摘要

  1. 根据世界气象组织 (WMO) 今天发布的一份报告，过去 11 年（2015 年至 2025 年）是有记录以来最热的一年，去年是自观测开始以来第二或第三最热的一年。跟踪重要气候指标的《2025 年全球气候状况》报告发现，去年大气中二氧化碳浓度和海洋温度达到了创纪录水平。报告指出，2025 年全球地表温度略低于前一年（有记录以来最热的一年），但持续出现异常高温。南极和北极的海冰数量是自 1979 年以来有记录以来最低的。澳大利亚墨尔本大学气候科学家曼迪·弗罗因德 (Mandy Freund) 表示，气温上升、海洋升温和冰川冰块融化的速度令人担忧。 “我们似乎正在进入一个新时代，气温将显着高于十年前，”来自堪培拉澳大利亚国立大学的气候科学家莎拉·珀金斯-柯克帕特里克说。她补充说，过去三年出现了巨大的气温变化，这只能是气候变化的结果。 能源失衡 该报告首次包括了对地球和大气中热量积累的测量。该指标被称为地球能量不平衡（EEI），气候科学家已经使用了至少十年，它是地球从太阳接收的能量与辐射回太空的能量之间的差值。它使科学家能够监测全球变暖的速度。 EEI 值为正值意味着地球上储存的热量总量正在增加。报告指出，去年 EEI 达到了自 1960 年开始观测以来的最高水平。大气中温室气体浓度的增加会捕获地球上的热量，从而减少辐射回太空的热量。澳大利亚悉尼新南威尔士大学的气候分析师托马斯·莫特洛克表示，将EEI纳入WMO报告中值得注意。他表示，通常情况下，地表温度的上升会成为头条新闻，但大气层仅吸收地球多余热量的 1%，因此用它来衡量全球变暖的严重程度“相当具有误导性”。他补充道，“自 20 世纪 70 年代以来，地球吸收的多余热量中，91% 以上都被海洋吸收了”。莫特洛克认为，地球的能源失衡是了解全球变暖的真正影响的更好描述。弗罗因德补充说，EEI 也是比比较平均气温更清晰的长期变化衡量标准，平均气温可能会因火山爆发或拉尼娜天气模式等短期影响事件而逐年波动。记录温室气体

Original Summary

  1. The past 11 years (2015-2025) have been the hottest on record, with last year being the second or third warmest year since observations began, according to a report released today by the World Meteorological Organization (WMO). The State of the Global Climate 2025 report, which tracks important climate indicators, found that atmospheric carbon dioxide concentrations and ocean temperatures reached record levels last year. Global surface temperatures were slightly lower in 2025 than the previous year — the hottest on record — but continued a run of exceptionally high temperatures, the report states. The amount of sea ice in the Antarctic and the Arctic was among the lowest recorded since 1979.The speed at which temperatures are rising, the ocean is heating up and glacial ice mass is melting is concerning, says Mandy Freund, a climate scientist at the University of Melbourne in Australia. “We seem to be entering this new era where temperatures will be significantly higher than what they were ten years ago,” says climate scientist Sarah Perkins-Kirkpatrick, who is from the Australian National University in Canberra. The past three years have seen large changes in temperature that could only be a result of climate change, she adds.Energy imbalanceFor the first time, the report includes a measure of the accumulation of heat on Earth and in the atmosphere. The indicator, called the Earth’s energy imbalance (EEI), has been used by climate scientists for at least a decade, and is the difference between the amount of energy that the Earth receives from the Sun and the amount radiated back into space. It allows scientists to monitor the rate of global warming. A positive EEI value means that the total amount of heat stored on Earth is increasing.Last year, the EEI reached its highest level since observations started in 1960, the report states. The increased concentration of greenhouse gases in the atmosphere traps heat on Earth, reducing the amount of warmth that is radiated back into space.Thomas Mortlock, a climate analyst at the University of New South Wales in Sydney, Australia, says that the inclusion of EEI in the WMO report is notable. Typically, the rise in surface temperatures is what makes headlines, but the atmosphere absorbs just 1% of the planet’s excess heat so using it to gauge the severity of global warming is “quite misleading”, he says. More than “91% of all of the excess heat that has been received by the Earth since the 1970s has been absorbed in the oceans”, he adds. Mortlock suggests that the planet’s energy imbalance is a much better descriptor to understand the true impact of global warming.Freund adds that EEI is also a clearer measure of long-term changes than comparing average temperatures, which can fluctuate year to year owing to events with short-term impacts, such as volcanic eruptions or the La Niña weather pattern.Record greenhouse gases

评论（默认中文）

Shitty-kitty 2026/03/24 03:16
澳大利亚被烧成一片沙漠。 欧洲森林被砍伐，鲸鱼几乎灭绝。 30-7000万头水牛被屠杀，其中大部分是被美洲原住民屠杀的，他们崇拜水牛数千年，突然间非常高兴，因为为了与白人进行贸易而消灭了水牛。 我们仅列举了许多历史性罪恶中的一些，但没有提及任何正在发生的罪恶。 人类已经没有希望了！
Australia was burnt into a desert. Europe was deforested and the whales were nearly made extinct. 30-70 million Buffalo were slaughtered, largely by Native American's who had worshiped them for thousands of years and were suddenly all to happy, to wipe them out for trade with the white man. A few of our many historic sins without mentioning any of the ongoing ones. Humanity is hopeless!

doubled112 2026/03/24 03:27

毁灭自己是你的本性。

在 HN 中查看
illithid0 2026/03/24 03:45
我常常想知道，我们目前所经历的意识或自我意识是否是气候变化等全物种问题的一个主要因素。

去年接触过扎普夫的“存在主义麋鹿”理论后，很难不将意识视为一种设计缺陷，而不是一种升级，它是驱动气候变化的根源，例如，气候变化。过度消费主义、不可再生材料的大量使用，以及我们为了个人满足而选择的所有其他事物，尽管对整体产生了负面影响。

如果没有意识，我们的生活是否会更好，或者至少不会对地球造成如此有害的影响？我不知道。

I often wonder if whatever it is we currently experience as consciousness or self-awareness was a major contributor to species-wide problems such as climate change.

Having come across Zapffe's "existential elk" theory in the last year, it's hard to not see consciousness as a design flaw rather than an upgrade that sits at the root of the things driving climate change, e.g. hyperconsumerism, rampant use of non-renewable materials, and all the other things we choose into for personal satisfaction despite the negative impacts to the whole.

Might we have been better off without consciousness, or at least not as detrimental to the planet? I don't know.

也许我们能活下来，也许我们不能。坦白说，我认为这并不重要。我们并不比听说的旅鼠自食其果更聪明。
Perhaps we survive, perhaps we don't. Frankly I don't believe it matters. We are no more intelligent then heard's of lemmings eating themselves into famine.

tencentshill 2026/03/24 00:15
本文指出，尽管存在自然循环并且为减少自然循环做出了成功的努力（禁止气溶胶），但世界正在明显变暖。 https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC10752897/
This paper notes that the world is getting measurably warmer DESPITE natural cycles and successful efforts to reduce it (aerosol ban). https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC10752897/
在 HN 中查看
wahern 2026/03/24 05:47
> 尽管存在自然循环并成功地减少了自然循环（禁止气溶胶）。

气溶胶总体上具有负辐射强迫，因此变暖的加剧在一定程度上是 因为 减少人为气溶胶排放。这种效应即使不是政策制定者和活动家，至少也是科学家们预料到的。

> DESPITE natural cycles and successful efforts to reduce it (aerosol ban).

Aerosols have on balance negative radiative forcing, so the increased warming is partly because of reductions in anthropogenic aerosol emissions. This effect was anticipated, at least by scientists, if not policymakers and activists.

在 HN 中查看
